message: Jake
Jennifer
Well,
you must have had a hard time. Well, various things.
Yeah. But I'm fine now.
Yes, yes, I'm really glad.
I'm happy you came.

The prime location, almost in the center of Manhattan, holds an invaluable worth. It's understandable why the exorbitant lodging fees exist.
It's a renowned hotel in New York, located in a perfect spot overlooking 5th Avenue.
Now that the filming has been canceled, I wonder if she’s the one paying for her stay? Why is she staying in New York?
Once you realize that there's nothing going on with the director, her smile feels like a genuine expression of affection.
Due to her refined features and unique aloof demeanor, she has endured some harsh words from others.
She is showing me her beautiful face with a slight smile, just like usual.
You must have had a hard time. Are you okay physically?
Thanks to you, I'm fine. I wasn't detained for too long, so I'm in good spirits. You've really helped me out. Thank you.
No, please don't thank me. I just did what I could.
I'm glad you could come out quickly. The idea of you being a murderer is just too much, right?
It's true that I was in a suspicious situation, though.
That may be true.
But it's awful not to investigate properly.
I can’t trust the police anymore!
Meryl is.
I wonder if she won't be able to keep being an actress. It seems the media hasn’t said anything yet, though.
Isn't that overthinking it?
Not at all. She was walking down the street in her loungewear, drunk. An actress showing such disgrace...
Sorry, but you know I don’t have good feelings about her. Let's stop talking about her.
I’m sorry.
It's not your fault, but...
I don't know why, but I just think she’s no good.
Did the director say anything about Meryl?
He said he couldn't get in touch with her. To make it worse, he probably regrets that she couldn't hurt anyone.
Well, did he say something like that?!
But, yes, it might be like that for her.
Are you saying such things, too?
Anyone who knows Meryl would think so.
She was sane at that time.
She smelled like alcohol, but I think her mind was probably clear.
Is that so?
She's an actress. If she happened to hurt Guy, I think she would have had an escape route prepared.
I wonder where Meryl is and what she's doing now.
It seems like you have a misunderstanding, but there’s nothing between me and the director. I just want you to understand that.
I understand that.
It's nothing to do with me.
Don't say such lonely things, please.
I love you. It's not that I like the director.
You don't have to say that every time.
No way. That won't do.
Please understand my feelings more.
, trust me.
There's nothing going on between the director and me.
Speaking of which, the director apologized to me.
He said he was seeking help.
Oh no, not the director.
There's no need to say such things.
I'm sorry for the trouble I caused you with my assumptions. I'm deeply sorry.
It's a terrible misunderstanding to think you're the culprit.
Yeah.
You seem down. Are you still tired?
I heard there have been four incidents already in New York, that murder case.
Ah, and three of them were involved with the director's party.
Who could be the culprit? If things go on like this, will everyone die?
I'm scared. I might be next.
The director was worried that someone with a grudge against him might be killing film industry personnel.
He told me something similar.
But that's strange. Not all victims are in the film industry.
Ginny seemed to have a connection with the director, and Cindy is probably an actress, right? Eva must have grasped a clue about the culprit.
But what about the first incident in New York? Are you saying that victim was also involved with this movie?
That's...
The director must be feeling negative. I think that's not a good trend.
Don't you have any leads on the culprit?
I'm just happy to know there's nothing between me and the director,
I can't thank enough for the help with my bail.
Now that the filming has been canceled, she shouldn't really have a reason to be in New York.
Is it self-centered to think it's for my sake?
Hearing 'I love you' from her isn't a bad feeling.
It was lucky that the party was full of people as close as family, and the direct victim was Guy.
Guy probably won't try to sue Meryl.
I wonder if Meryl's strange behavior has already become gossip.
Eventually, one of the people at the party will probably spill the story.
Is that a famous actress running around in her loungewear?
What would the people who saw that have thought? Did they mistake it for filming or something?
Now that my relationship with Meryl has ended,
giving up on it must have been quite a hard decision. The director is mature.
It seems he has no intention of getting back together with Meryl. After something like that, he definitely wouldn’t feel that way.
I wonder if he's already thinking about the next movie. I hope this incident doesn't tarnish the director's career.
For the police to think I'm the culprit is quite an outrageous idea. Sure, I was acquainted with the three who were killed,
It seems the police are still unable to figure out what kind of person the culprit is. For now, they seem to be pulling in related people.
Now that they know I'm not the culprit, who do the police think the next suspect is?
Come and hang out again, please.
*** It's a bug ***
